name: Iso11783PDDSetParameter
title: Iso11783PDDSetParameter
syntax: long Iso11783PDDSetParameter( dword ecuHandle, char paramName[], float paramValue );
description: Changes an internal parameter of the PDD API.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU. The handle must be created with Iso11783CreateECU beforehand or ZERO for general parameters.

parameters.name: "debug"
parameters.description: activates debug outputs in the Write Window 1: on 0: off

parameters.name: "autoUpdateVariable"
parameters.description: process variable is updated if value command is received 1: auto update 0: process variable has to be updated manually by Iso11783PDDSetValue e.g. in callback function Iso11783PDDOnDataChanged)

parameters.name: "version"
parameters.description: supported version of the ISO11783 specification: 1,2 (default), 3, and 4

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
